summary: Uncertified-community pack that runs local-only experimental lint checks; CI lane declines to run uncertified bundles.
operator_caveat: Uncertified community pack — the local lane previews and runs experimental lints, the CI lane declines uncertified packs, and the operator is responsible for the result.

checks.summary: Community-authored experimental lint that runs only in the local lane while uncertified.
checks.parity_note: Local-only by design; CI lane declines uncertified-community packs and the local lane is responsible for any result.

checks.summary: Experimental probe whose local/CI parity has not been certified yet; reviewer must inspect before adopting.
checks.parity_note: Parity unknown — reviewer must inspect the probe before adopting it in either lane.

ownership_hints.summary: Community experimental review group fields questions about uncertified scopes.

parity_observations.summary: Experimental lint runs local-only; CI lane declines to engage uncertified packs.
Probe parity is uncertified; reviewer must inspect before adopting in either lane.

unsupported_fields.summary: Community telemetry blob is experimental-local-only and is ignored when exporting support packets.
